creator: j@jedi.claranet.fr
text:
diff -urN ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/Makefile ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/Makefile
--- ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/Makefile	Mon May 28 13:29:51 2001
+++ ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/Makefile	Tue May 29 14:22:36 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pure-ftpd
-PORTVERSION=	0.98.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.98.3
 CATEGORIES=	ftp ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	pureftpd
diff -urN ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/distinfo ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/distinfo
--- ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/distinfo	Mon May 28 13:29:51 2001
+++ ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/distinfo	Tue May 29 14:22:46 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (pure-ftpd-0.98.2.tar.gz) = 3d24ae42de19311d2b67f847c1d0af41
+MD5 (pure-ftpd-0.98.3.tar.gz) = 4d8c78abeda982f66435894d1ddab962

Fix: 

This release fixes a nasty bug with the MLSD command and symbolic links to
directories. Also, "." is now accepted in LDAP login names, and there are
other minor bug fixes.
